mapper.select: select a.ordym, a.ordno, f.ordymd, a.custcd, c.custnm, a.yymmdd, a.gubun, case datepart(dw, convert(date, a.yymmdd)) when 1 then '일' when 2 then '월' when 3 then '화' when 4 then '수' when 5 then '목' when 6 then '금' when 7 then '토' end as day_nm, a.ser, a.napgiymd as napgi_dt, a.itemcd, b.itemnm, a.linecd, d.linenm, b.itsize, b.unit, a.progcd, e.prognm, a.planqty, a.ordqty, f.ordamt as suppamt from hppl160t_tbl a left join hsba010t_tbl b on a.cmpycd = b.cmpycd and a.itemcd = b.itemcd left join haba020t_tbl c on a.cmpycd = c.cmpycd and a.custcd = c.custcd left join hpba130t_tbl d on a.cmpycd = d.cmpycd and a.linecd = d.linecd left join hpba100t_tbl e on a.cmpycd = e.cmpycd and a.linecd = e.linecd and a.progcd = e.progcd left join hsio031t_tbl f on a.cmpycd = f.cmpycd and a.ordym = f.ordym and a.ordno = f.ordno and a.orowno = f.orowno where a.cmpycd = #{cmpycd} and a.yymmdd = #{yymmdd} and a.linecd = #{linecd} and isnull(a.planqty, 0) - isnull(a.ordqty, 0) > 0 order by a.itemcd, a.linecd, a.progcd;

select a.progcd, b.prognm, a.itemcd, c.itemnm, c.itsize, c.unit, a.planqty, a.gubun, isnull(d.ordqty, 0) as ordqty, d.lotno, isnull(d.ordymd, '') as ordymd, d.ordym, d.ordno, case when isnull(d.prodqty, 0) > 0 then 'n' else 'y' end as updyn, a.yymmdd, a.ser, a.linecd from hppl160t_tbl a left join hpba100t_tbl b on a.cmpycd = b.cmpycd and a.linecd = b.linecd and a.progcd = b.progcd left join hsba010t_tbl c on a.cmpycd = c.cmpycd and a.itemcd = c.itemcd left join hpio210t_tbl d on a.cmpycd = d.cmpycd and a.linecd = d.linecd and a.progcd = d.progcd and a.yymmdd = d.yymmdd and a.ser = d.ser and a.itemcd = d.itemcd where a.cmpycd = #{cmpycd} and a.linecd = #{linecd} and a.yymmdd = #{yymmdd} and d.lotno is not null
mapper.insert: insert into HPIO210T_TBL(cmpycd, linecd, progcd, lotno, ordymd, lotymd, itemcd, itsize, unit, lotsize, ordqty, prodqty, bigo, useyn, ordyn, gubun, yymmdd, ser, ordym, ordno, addtime, updtime, updemp) values (#{cmpycd},#{linecd},#{progcd},#{lotno}, #{ordymd},#{ordymd},#{itemcd},#{itsize},#{unit}, #{ordqty},#{ordqty},0,#{custnm},'Y','Y', #{gubun}, #{yymmdd},#{ser}, isnull(#{ordym}, left(#{ordymd}, 6)), #{ordno}, getdate(),getdate(),#{updemp})

insert into HPIO200T_TBL(cmpycd, linecd, lotno, lotymd, itemcd, itsize, unit, lotsize, ordqty, stymd, toymd, bigo, useyn, ordym, ordno, addtime, updtime, updemp) values(#{cmpycd}, #{linecd}, #{lotno}, #{ordymd}, #{itemcd}, #{itsize}, #{unit}, #{ordqty}, #{ordqty}, #{ordymd}, #{ordymd}, #{custnm}, 'Y', isnull(#{ordym}, left(#{ordymd}, 6)), #{ordno}, getdate(),getdate(), #{updemp})
